task: Create the static two-page CeraMirycs website under deliverables/site.
must_not: Do not invent realistic contact data.
Do not add backend, CMS, forms, analytics, maps, ecommerce, external embeds or deployment.
Do not claim specific products, prices, locations or social handles not provided by the user.
verification_commands: Search deliverables/site for email-like strings, phone-like strings and social handles.
token_notes: Read summaries first. Use full blueprints only if summaries conflict with the Agent Package.
